creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 259145
victoria-metrics.patch

(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #47)
> Please checkout the latest version and let's proceed from there.
New version of the review:
- portfmt+portclippy;
- added VICTORIA_METRICS_USER, VICTORIA_METRICS_GROUP and changed VICTORIA_METRICS_DATADIR for FreeBSD ports framework.
- separated GH_TAG for easy maintain;
- changed ALL_TARGET behavior for using in cluster version (very necessary change);
- refactored do-install-DOCS-on.

What do you think about it?
